generated_by: AI-assisted public-source research; consumer GTM repair 2026-06-17
disclaimer: Only sourced money events are written as facts. Unsupported founder cash, margin, burn, loss, CAC, refund or subsidy amounts remain in research_gaps.

founder_background: 雷军 Lei Jun: Wuhan University CS graduate; Kingsoft executive, Joyo.com founder/seller, angel investor and Xiaomi founder; his public persona is a distribution asset.
Lin Bin and Xiaomi co-founders: Xiaomi was co-founded by Lei Jun with Lin Bin and other technology/product leaders; do not reduce the company to one person operationally.
brand_timeline: 2004: exit $75M - Joyo.com was sold to Amazon, giving Lei Jun a proven pre-Xiaomi entrepreneurial track record.
2010: series_a $41M - Xiaomi raised Series A funding in 2010 after founding.
2011: series_b $90M - Xiaomi raised Series B funding in December 2011.
2012: series_c $216M - Xiaomi raised Series C at about $4B valuation.
2018: ipo up to $6.1B target - Xiaomi’s Hong Kong IPO roadshow targeted a large raise; use filings for exact final proceeds.
2021: ev_commitment RMB 10B initial / USD 10B over decade - Lei Jun announced Xiaomi’s smart EV entry and long-term investment plan.
2024-Q2: ev_loss $252M loss - Media reported EV branch loss before scale, illustrating the cash pressure of entering cars.
2025: revenue RMB 457.29B revenue - Media coverage of Xiaomi 2025 earnings reports record revenue and strong EV growth.

source.title: Business Insider Xiaomi EV profitability report

capital_history.description: Media coverage of Xiaomi 2025 earnings reports record revenue and strong EV growth.

research_gaps: Lei Jun personal cash put into Xiaomi is not written without a reliable source.
Exact Xiaomi Auto per-car margin, warranty reserve and customer acquisition cost need official filings.
Use Xiaomi annual/interim reports for investor-grade financial numbers.

gtm_extension.summary: 雷军报告的 GTM 应该写成“创始人 IP + 极致性价比 + 生态链 + 发布会转化 + 小米汽车放大器”，而不是把雷军个人经历当成单一品牌财务表。雷军的核心作用是把小米的产品故事人格化：手机时代靠 MIUI 社群和性价比，IoT 时代靠生态链，汽车时代靠 SU7/YU7 发布会、工厂叙事和极强社交传播完成高客单价迁移。
gtm_extension.one_sentence_gtm: 雷军报告的 GTM 应该写成“创始人 IP + 极致性价比 + 生态链 + 发布会转化 + 小米汽车放大器”，而不是把雷军个人经历当成单一品牌财务表。
channel_path: MIUI community validates software-first phone demand
Xiaomi phone + online flash sale builds price-performance identity
SU7/YU7 uses Lei Jun personal IP to sell high-ticket EVs

channels.dtc: Official site/store is the clearest conversion path and pricing source.
channels.ecommerce: Marketplaces, retailers, and regional stores broaden reach beyond owned traffic.
channels.pr_media: Reviews, launch events, and credible media explain why the product deserves attention.
channels.community: User reviews, forums, creator content, or owner communities decide whether early demand becomes trust.
channels.service: Warranty, repair, delivery, setup, installation, and support determine long-term brand quality.
channels.founder_ip: Lei Jun’s launch events, social media and personal credibility are a core channel.
channels.ecosystem: Xiaomi Home, HyperOS and IoT devices cross-sell from phone to car to appliances.

business_model.pricing_logic: High spec at aggressive price, then monetize scale through services, accessories, ecosystem and premium upgrades.
business_model.channel_economics: Online launch and founder-led content lower trust friction but create delivery and quality pressure.

gtm_extension.top_products_selection_rule: 最多选 3 个产品或产品线；按公开证据、价格结构、GTM 学习价值和用户购买决策选择。

top_products.name: Xiaomi SU7 / YU7 Auto
top_products.why_selected: Xiaomi Auto is the biggest test of Lei Jun’s founder-led GTM.
top_products.origin_story: Lei Jun announced Xiaomi’s EV entry in 2021 and personally led the project narrative.
top_products.pre_market: Before launch, users compared Xiaomi to Tesla, BYD, Nio and Porsche/Taycan-like design cues.
top_products.innovation: Consumer electronics speed, HyperOS cockpit, aggressive pricing and direct-to-consumer launch events.
top_products.breakout: SU7/YU7 generated huge orders and moved Xiaomi from phone brand into mobility brand.
top_products.customer_impact: Users buy a car partly because they trust Xiaomi’s device ecosystem and Lei Jun’s promise of value.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It shows how founder IP can move from low/medium-ticket electronics into high-ticket cars.

pricing_model.product_price: SU7 original prices: RMB 215,900 / 245,900 / 299,900; SU7 Ultra launched at RMB 529,900; YU7 reported starting price RMB 253,500 with Pro/Max at RMB 279,900 / 329,900.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Software boundary: HyperOS/cockpit and updates are part of vehicle experience; no reliable mandatory consumer software subscription is written here.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: insurance, charging, autonomous-driving options, maintenance, tires, accessories and extended warranty need buyer-level quote; do not invent fixed service fee.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Tesla Model 3/Y, BYD Han/Seal, Nio ET/ES and Xpeng compete; YU7 was reported as slightly below Tesla Model Y in China.

sources.title: Business Insider YU7 orders and price

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。
GTM 的重点是让用户相信长期价值，而不是只看首发声量。
创始人履历和公司资本链条要分开写，避免把人物叙事当成财务事实。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把找不到来源的自筹金额、毛利、亏损或补贴硬写进报告。
不要复制表面的发布会打法，先确认供应链、售后和复购逻辑。

sources.title: Business Insider YU7 orders and price

top_products.name: Xiaomi 15 / 15 Ultra + HyperOS
top_products.why_selected: Smartphones remain the ecosystem entry and Apple/Huawei comparison point.
top_products.origin_story: Xiaomi began with MIUI before hardware; phone GTM is software/community-first.
top_products.pre_market: Users compare Xiaomi to Apple, Samsung, Huawei, OPPO and vivo on camera, chip, price and ecosystem.
top_products.innovation: Flagship camera partnerships, HyperOS device continuity and aggressive specs.
top_products.breakout: Xiaomi uses flagship phones to pull brand upward while Redmi covers mass price bands.
top_products.customer_impact: Consumers get near-premium hardware at lower or more flexible price bands than Apple/Samsung Ultra.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It keeps Xiaomi’s installed base large enough to feed IoT and EV awareness.

pricing_model.product_price: European launch coverage: Xiaomi 15 from €999 / £899; Xiaomi 15 Ultra from €1,499 / £1,299; China prices vary by SKU and promotion.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Software/subscription boundary: HyperOS is included; Xiaomi Cloud, app store, content and internet services monetize users separately.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: photography kit for Xiaomi 15 Ultra reported at £179; cases, chargers, warranties and cloud storage add cost.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: iPhone 17 family, Galaxy S Ultra and Huawei Pura/Mate occupy similar high-end bands; Apple iPhone 17 starts around $799 and Pro models price higher by storage.

sources.title: The Verge Xiaomi 15 / 15 Ultra Europe price

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。
GTM 的重点是让用户相信长期价值，而不是只看首发声量。
创始人履历和公司资本链条要分开写，避免把人物叙事当成财务事实。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把找不到来源的自筹金额、毛利、亏损或补贴硬写进报告。
不要复制表面的发布会打法，先确认供应链、售后和复购逻辑。

sources.title: The Verge Xiaomi 15 / 15 Ultra Europe price

top_products.name: Xiaomi AIoT / Home ecosystem
top_products.why_selected: 生态链是雷军方法论从手机扩张到家庭和汽车的中间层。
top_products.origin_story: Xiaomi used investee/ecosystem companies and Xiaomi Home to broaden device categories.
top_products.pre_market: Users first enter through low-friction smart bands, cameras, TVs, appliances or scooters.
top_products.innovation: HyperOS connects phone, watch, TV, appliance and car interfaces.
top_products.breakout: IoT/lifestyle revenue became a major segment and store-traffic engine.
top_products.customer_impact: Users get one account and one app logic across many devices.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It gives Xiaomi a distribution advantage that pure phone or pure EV companies do not have.

pricing_model.product_price: Product prices vary widely from smart bands to TVs, appliances and scooters; use official Xiaomi regional stores for live SKU prices.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Subscription/software boundary: many devices work without subscription, but cloud storage, content services and app services may be paid.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: installation, filters, consumables, batteries, spare parts and warranties are meaningful total-cost items.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Apple Home, Samsung SmartThings, Huawei HarmonyOS, Anker/Eufy, DJI ecosystem and Roborock/Dreame compete by category.

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。
GTM 的重点是让用户相信长期价值，而不是只看首发声量。
创始人履历和公司资本链条要分开写，避免把人物叙事当成财务事实。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把找不到来源的自筹金额、毛利、亏损或补贴硬写进报告。
不要复制表面的发布会打法，先确认供应链、售后和复购逻辑。

learning_summary: 雷军 GTM 的关键不是“模仿乔布斯”，而是把创始人信任变成产品转化。
小米汽车证明人物 IP 可以迁移到高客单价，但交付和安全风险同步放大。
人物报告必须把个人履历、公司融资和产品价格分层写。
gtm_extension.evidence_boundary: 找不到的内容不补写；缺失的创始人现金、单台毛利、广告投放、退货损失、售后成本留在 research_gaps。
